{{CargoRelic
|name=Benedictus Safe Glass
|class_id=22415
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=06-12
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.03%)
|description=On Jun 12, 1910 AD, Benedictus applied for a patent for safety glass.<br>The inspiration for this invention came from Benedictus's experience cleaning a laboratory. He accidentally knocked over a boiling flask but found that it remained intact despite being covered in cracks. After studying it, he discovered that the flask had once contained nitrocellulose, leaving behind a thin film on the wall. Based on this amazing discovery, he created the world's first laminated glass, greatly improving the safety of glass.
|fame=44
|art=26
|fth=22
|civ=28
|tech=34
|ss1=Zombie Minion ATK +1%
|ss2=Zombie Minion ATK +2%
|ss3=Zombie Minion ATK +3%
|ss4=Zombie Minion ATK +5%
|ss7=Zombie Minion ATK +5%<br>Zombie Minion ATK +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Desertsanctum skill I.png|50px]]Place in Desert Sanctum: Desert Sanctum, Glorium Output +5%
}}
